_meta.comment: English translations for VerordnungsAmpel GUI. German legal terms (AM-RL, BSG, BSNR/LANR, Praxisbesonderheit) are preserved as proper nouns or marked in context. Schema cf. Geiger 2026 (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18736725, MIT).

APP_TAGLINE: Software draft — recourse risk indicators from public German GKV rule sets (no warranty)
TRAY_TOOLTIP: VerordnungsAmpel — risk check (software draft, no warranty)
CHECK_NO_LOG: Do NOT store result in compliance log
CHECK_HINT_EMPTY: Enter ICD and ATC code, then click 'Check'.
CHECK_HINT_UNKNOWN: No match — this combination is not in our rule set. If in doubt, manually verify against the AM-RL.
CHECK_ERROR_MISSING: ICD and ATC code are required.
JUSTIFY_NO_DATA: First run a check on the 'Check' tab. Structured justification is only required for YELLOW or RED results.
JUSTIFY_GRUEN_HINT: Result is GREEN — no structured justification required. You can still document voluntarily.
JUSTIFY_INTRO: The following fields must be filled in at the moment of prescription (SG Marburg 14 Feb 2024; BSG B 6 KA 26/13). Retrospective documentation is NOT sufficient.
JUSTIFY_CONFIRM: I confirm that the information is accurate at the time of prescription.
JUSTIFY_SUCCESS: Justification successfully sealed in compliance log.
WORKFLOW_INTRO: Generate a pre-clarification workflow (application / notice / statement) for container markers from the traffic-light result.
WORKFLOW_NO_DATA: First run a check on the 'Check' tab. The workflow is derived from the traffic-light result.
WORKFLOW_KEINE_AKTION: No pre-clarification step is required for this prescription.
REMINDER_EMPTY: No prescriptions with practice-specific exception in this quarter.
ABOUT_TEXT:
VerordnungsAmpel — prototype v{version}
Software draft for matching physician prescriptions
against public German GKV rule sets (AM-RL, PRISCUS 2.0).
Display of recourse risk indicators without warranty.
Published for research and further-development purposes.
Not a medical device. Not recourse prevention. Not clinically
validated. Does not replace medical review.
License: GPL-3.0-or-later
HINT_NOT_MEDICAL_DEVICE: Note: This is an informational tool, not a medical device. It does NOT replace medical review of the individual case.
STATUS_PERMANENT_DISCLAIMER: Pre-Alpha — not clinically validated — no warranty
DISCLAIMER_DIALOG_TITLE: VerordnungsAmpel — please acknowledge the terms of use
DISCLAIMER_DIALOG_HEADLINE: Before using this tool, please confirm the following points:
DISCLAIMER_CHECK_NOT_VALIDATED: I understand that this tool is not clinically validated.
DISCLAIMER_CHECK_NOT_CERTIFIED: I understand that it is not a medical device and not certified.
DISCLAIMER_CHECK_DOCTOR_RESPONSIBILITY: I confirm that medical responsibility for every prescription remains with me.
DISCLAIMER_CHECK_OWN_RISK: I use the tool at my own risk (liability limited to intent and gross negligence, § 521 BGB).
DISCLAIMER_INFO_BUTTONS: The Accept button is enabled only after all four points are checked. If rejected, the application will close.
